records.ety: [LL. entitas, fr. L. ens, entis, thing, prop. p. pr. of esse to be: cf. F. entit. See Essence, Is.]

defs: A real being, whether in thought (as an ideal conception) or in fact; being; essence; existence.
quotes: Self-subsisting entities, such as our own personality.
Fortune is no real entity, . . . but a mere relative signification.
